title: Leji agent profile frontmatter
description: Validates the YAML frontmatter of an agent profile document. The markdown body stays free-form.

id.description: Stable identifier for this profile, e.g. "core" or "reviewer".

role.description: The role identifier this profile fills, bound in the manifest's agents map.

purpose.description: One line on what this role is for.

inherits.description: id of the profile this one extends, typically the core profile.

requiredRead.description: Paths this role loads before any task.

defaultContext.description: Categories this role loads by default.

mustAskWhen.description: Conditions under which the role must stop and ask a human.

mustRefuseWhen.description: Conditions under which the role must refuse outright rather than ask.

escalation.description: Who or what to escalate to.

reviewAfter.description: ISO 8601 date after which the profile should be reviewed for staleness.

host.description: The agent host that runs this agent, e.g. "claude-code", "codex", "cursor". Omit for host-agnostic profiles.

command.description: Command template to engage this agent from a shell, with <prompt> as the placeholder.

constraints.description: Operational constraints worth machine-knowing, e.g. prompt length limits, timeouts.

invocation.description: How to engage this agent as an external CLI. Omit for the host's own resident agent.
